hero_subtitle: SFTY structures and preserves evidence from corporate, UBO, and director checks into audit-ready workflows that connect KYB data across multiple providers for VASP compliance teams.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when evidence stays scattered
problem_description: KYB workflows become manual and error-prone when documentation and provider results remain disconnected across companies, UBOs and directors. This fragmentation makes it difficult for teams to build a clear audit trail and prepare defensible regulatory reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes company, UBO and director evidence from multiple providers into one audit-ready workflow so compliance teams can track, review and defend KYB decisions efficiently and clearly.
workflow_title: From KYB checks to evidence collection
workflow_description: SFTY channels KYB provider outputs through rules and reviews to create cases that preserve corporate, UBO, and director evidence for compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented evidence. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYB provider outputs into structured evidence, workflows, decisions and audit-ready cases without replacing the tools compliance teams already use.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP operations that require structured KYB workflows, defensible evidence preservation, bank due diligence support and scalable enterprise deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how to collect KYB evidence efficiently

ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence is preserved and linked to cases

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for KYB evidence collection?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects KYB provider outputs into one workflow, structuring checks on companies, UBOs and directors into reviewable cases with evidence and internal decision logs for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage KYB case workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY automates case creation from KYB alerts, routes tasks to reviewers, records decisions, preserves evidence packages and supports escalation to support controlled, auditable KYB workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve KYB audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves KYB evidence by linking provider data, review notes, decision logs and internal policies into audit-ready case records for ongoing compliance and regulatory inspection readiness.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY is provider-neutral and integrates multiple KYB sources, connecting their outputs into a single compliance operating layer without replacing existing provider systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYB or compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYB and compliance providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows, evidence packages and reporting rather than replacing the underlying tools.
final_title: Structure KYB evidence into audit-ready workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects corporate, UBO and director checks into controlled cases that preserve evidence and support operational decisions.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
